## IMQOptions.watcherCheckDelay property

Watcher check delay period. This is used by a queue watcher agent to make sure at least one watcher is available for queue operations.

 {<!-- -->number<!-- -->}

**Signature:**

```typescript
watcherCheckDelay?: number;
```
